zh.lifeSummary: 當Kathrina Marston於1542年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾可斯時，她的父親Johannes MARSTON22歲，母親Maria Turuile20歲。她於1561年10月7日與William Dillingham Sr.在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾可斯巴賀結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1603年2月21日在英國英格蘭貝德福爾迪恩享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Kathrina Marston于1542年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾可斯时，她的父亲Johannes MARSTON22岁，母亲Maria Turuile20岁。她于1561年10月7日与William Dillingham Sr.在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾可斯巴賀结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1603年2月21日在英国英格兰貝德福爾迪恩享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Marston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or other of the numerous places called Marston or Merston, in counties including Bedfordshire, Cheshire, Derbyshire, Gloucestershire, Isle of Wight, Kent, Northamptonshire, Oxfordshire, Shropshire, Staffordshire, Sussex, and Worcestershire. Most of the placenames derive from Old English mersc ‘marsh’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Marson
meanings: English (Midlands): variant of Marston , a common placename which was often spelled and pronounced Marson.
French: habitational name from any of the places so called in Marne and Meuse, or from Marçon in Sarthe. This surname is also found in Germany.

variants.name: Maston
meanings: English: variant of Marston with loss of -r-.

nameMeanings.name: Kathrina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Katherine
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Kathrina Marston was born in 1542, in Cotes, Leicestershire, England, her father, Johannes MARSTON, was 22 and her mother, Maria Turuile, was 20. She married William Dillingham Sr. on 7 October 1561, in Cotesbach, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 21 February 1603, in Dean, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Kathrina Marston est née en 1542, à Cotes, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Johannes MARSTON, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Maria Turuile, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé William Dillingham Sr. le 7 octobre 1561, à Cotesbach, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 février 1603, à Dean, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Kathrina Marston 1542 in Cotes, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Johannes MARSTON 22 und ihre Mutter Maria Turuile 20. Sie hat am 7. Oktober 1561 in Cotesbach, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom William Dillingham Sr. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. Februar 1603 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Dean, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Kathrina Marston è nata il nel 1542 nel Cotes, Leicestershire, England, sua padre, Johannes MARSTON, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Maria Turuile, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato William Dillingham Sr. il 7 ottobre 1561, nel Cotesbach, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 21 febbraio 1603, nel Dean, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Kathrina Marstonが1542年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアコツで生まれた時，父Johannes MARSTONは22歳，母Maria Turuileは20歳であった。1561年10月7日にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアコテスバチでWilliam Dillingham Sr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1603年2月21日にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアディーンで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Kathrina Marston(이)가 1542년 영국 레이스스터실르 컷스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Johannes MARSTON(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maria Turuile(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1561년 10월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 컷스바치에서 William Dillingham Sr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1603년 2월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 디에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Kathrina Marston nasceu em 1542, em Cotes, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Johannes MARSTON, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Maria Turuile, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com William Dillingham Sr. em 7 de outubro de 1561, em Cotesbach, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de fevereiro de 1603, em Dean, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Kathrina Marston родилась в 1542 г. в местности котесь, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Johannes MARSTON было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Maria Turuile, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Dillingham Sr. 7 октября 1561 г. в местности котесбач, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 21 февраля 1603 г. в местности дин, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Kathrina Marston nació en 1542, en Cotes, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Johannes MARSTON, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Maria Turuile, tenía 20 años. Se casó con William Dillingham Sr. el 7 de octubre de 1561, en Cotesbach, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 21 de febrero de 1603, en Dean, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 61 años.
